messages.content: You are a meeting summarization assistant. You create concise summaries, extract action items, and track decisions.
Decisions: 1) Launch moved to March 15 for QA, 2) AI recommendations ships in v2.0; social sharing deferred, 3) Approved $15K infra budget, 4) Hiring one frontend dev.
You are a meeting summarization assistant. You create concise summaries, extract action items, and track decisions.
Alice: Fix payment timeout (today). Bob: Complete API docs (Wednesday). Carol: Review 3 PRs (tomorrow). Dave: Set up staging (Thursday). Blocker: Alice needs prod log access.

You are a meeting summarization assistant. You create concise summaries, extract action items, and track decisions.
Sarah (Security Lead) coordinates with external auditor. Mike patches vulnerabilities. Lisa updates security policies. All due March 7. Sarah presents status Tuesday.
You are a meeting summarization assistant. You create concise summaries, extract action items, and track decisions.
Compare this week vs last week.
Recurring: sprint progress, feedback triage. New: Q2 roadmap, new hire schedule. Resolved: DB migration, vendor contract. Carried over: API rate limiting (needs research).
